escalation.rationale: Iran maintains Strait of Hormuz blockade despite extended ceasefire, explosions reported in Tehran, and continued strikes in Gaza and Lebanon.

ticker_items: Iran vows to keep Hormuz closed while US blockade continues
Explosions in Tehran raise fears of renewed hostilities
Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended by three weeks after Washington talks
Five killed including three children in Israeli Gaza strike
Ukrainian couple aged 75 killed in Russian attack on Odesa

eastern_europe.description: Russian overnight assault hits residential buildings and bulk carrier, killing married couple aged 75.

middle_east.description: Israeli strike kills five people including three children according to Palestinian reports.
Israeli airstrike kills Lebanese journalist Amal Khalil who took cover in a house.

middle_east.text: Iran says it wants talks, but blames US breach of commitments, blockade and threats for stalling negotiations
middle_east.speaker: Iran government
middle_east.title: Official statement

middle_east.text: There is no time frame for ending the U.S. conflict with Iran
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: U.S. President

observers.description: Pakistan successfully requested extension of U.S.-Iran ceasefire and is brokering diplomatic pause. Vice President JD Vance made trip to Pakistan as part of diplomatic efforts. Pakistan positioned as key mediator in Iran conflict negotiations.

China stepping up as global mediator playing key role in de-escalating Iran war. Its economic ties give unique influence as U.S. actions create tensions with allies. China's diplomatic efforts growing as alternative to Western mediation.

German industry transitioning to military production with defense firms having dedicated section at Hanover industrial fair for first time. Germany embarking on massive rearmament drive. German parliament speaker targeted by Russian phishing attack.

financial.notes: Strait of Hormuz blockade continues to pose greatest threat to global economy with indefinite closure of strategic waterway.

update_log.text: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended by three weeks after Washington talks with Israeli and Lebanese envoys
Explosions in Tehran raise fears of renewed hostilities amid fragile ceasefire
Iran maintains vow not to reopen Strait of Hormuz while U.S. naval blockade remains in place
Ukrainian married couple aged 75 killed in Russian overnight attack on Odesa
Five killed including three children in Israeli strike in northern Gaza
